MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MARJORIE MORGENSTERN's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

No apperances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Carey Alexander's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V Da Fonseca; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
